groups.babysit: PR babysitter — CI watcher attached by /ca:pr
groups.prune: Transcript pruning — after-each-turn service and its tuning knobs
groups.farm-mutation: Farm mutation guard — anti-gaming quality signal

settings.name: CODEARBITER_BABYSIT
settings.description: When on, /ca:pr auto-attaches a CI watcher to the PR it opens (same as running /ca:watch by hand).

settings.name: CODEARBITER_BABYSIT_ONRED
settings.description: Watcher depth on a red check: propose (name cause, suggest fix, touch nothing) or branch (also stage the fix on spike/fix-*).

settings.name: CODEARBITER_PRUNE
settings.description: After-each-turn transcript pruning service: off, dry (log would-be prunes, touch nothing), or on (execute at safe boundaries).

settings.name: CODEARBITER_PRUNE_TIER
settings.description: Prune aggressiveness: gentle (sidecar + oversize clamp), standard (+ reasoning fold, aged/MCP/shell), aggressive (+ stale reads, dedup, images).

settings.name: CODEARBITER_PRUNE_STRATEGIES
settings.description: Comma-separated list restricting which prune strategies run. Unset = every strategy the tier enables.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_PRUNE_MAXBYTES
settings.description: Byte threshold above which a tool output is clamped by the oversize strategy.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_PRUNE_KEEP_RECENT
settings.description: K most recent tool-bearing turns kept verbatim (a turn is an assistant tool_use plus its results).

settings.name: CODEARBITER_PRUNE_MIN_SIZE
settings.description: Minimum transcript size in bytes before the service considers pruning at all.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_PRUNE_MIN_GROWTH
settings.description: Minimum growth in bytes since the last prune before the service acts again.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_PRUNE_BACKUPS
settings.description: Rotated transcript backups kept in ~/.codearbiter/prune-backups/ before each executed prune.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_PRUNE_LIVE_SECS
settings.description: Live-session throttle: minimum seconds between service prunes of the same transcript.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_PRUNE_METRICS
settings.description: Override the dry-run metrics log path. Unset = ~/.codearbiter/metrics/prune-dry.jsonl (~ expanded).

settings.name: CODEARBITER_PRUNE_NUDGE
settings.description: Cold-miss nudge: block a submit once with an advisory when a cold re-cache would land on bloated context. Needs CODEARBITER_PRUNE=on.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_PRUNE_NUDGE_IDLE_SECS
settings.description: Idle seconds before the cold-miss nudge arms.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_PRUNE_NUDGE_MIN_TOKENS
settings.description: Estimated freed tokens required before the cold-miss nudge arms.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_STATUSLINE
settings.description: Set off to disable the statusline renderer entirely (wiring stays; /ca:statusline uninstall removes it).

settings.name: CODEARBITER_COMPACT
settings.description: Lean statusline: drop the subagent rows.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_WIDTH
settings.description: Statusline box width. Unset = auto from the terminal (clamped 70..160); an explicit value is used verbatim.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_COMPACT_AT
settings.description: Context percentage treated as the compaction threshold by the statusline's context segment.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_BASE_BRANCH
settings.description: Base branch the session-start git staleness check compares against.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_LEDGER
settings.description: Override the token-ledger file location. Unset = ~/.codearbiter/ledger.json.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_UPDATE_STATE
settings.description: Override the update-check cache path (mainly for tests). Unset = ~/.codearbiter/update-state.json.

settings.name: CODEARBITER_DEV
settings.description: Maintainer override gate for /ca:dev — suspends orchestration to edit codeArbiter itself. Entry/exit logged to overrides.log.

settings.name: FARM_API_KEY
settings.description: OpenAI-compatible provider key for --farm workers. Never persisted to settings.json — export it in your shell profile.

settings.name: FARM_MODEL
settings.description: Force a worker model id, skipping canary selection. Unset = auto-selected at dispatch.

settings.name: FARM_API_BASE_URL
settings.description: Worker endpoint base URL. Unset = plan.json's recorded endpoint, then FARM_DEFAULT_API_BASE_URL.

settings.name: FARM_DEFAULT_API_BASE_URL
settings.description: Last-resort worker endpoint when neither env nor plan.meta names one.

settings.name: FARM_CANDIDATE_MODELS
settings.description: Comma-separated model ids for --canary probing. Normally set by the dispatch skill.

settings.name: FARM_CONCURRENCY
settings.description: Max concurrent task workers — the shared ceiling on total in-flight worker calls, including best-of-N samples.

settings.name: FARM_SAMPLES
settings.description: Best-of-N candidates per task attempt; the first to pass the gate wins. 1 = single-candidate path.

settings.name: FARM_TEMPERATURE
settings.description: Worker sampling temperature. Auto-bumped to 0.7 when FARM_SAMPLES>1 and this is unset; set explicitly to override.

settings.name: FARM_MAX_TOKENS
settings.description: Max completion tokens per worker call. Unset/0 = provider default.

settings.name: FARM_MAX_RETRIES
settings.description: Gate retries per task before escalating to the premium path.

settings.name: FARM_BASE_BRANCH
settings.description: Branch the farm integration branch is cut from.

settings.name: FARM_INTEGRATION_BRANCH
settings.description: Name of the integration branch farm tasks merge into.

settings.name: FARM_WORKTREE_ROOT
settings.description: Root directory for per-task git worktrees. Must stay inside the repo unless FARM_ALLOW_EXTERNAL_WORKTREE_ROOT=1.

settings.name: FARM_ALLOW_EXTERNAL_WORKTREE_ROOT
settings.description: Security override (#163): permit a worktree root outside the repo. Leave off unless you know why you need it.

settings.name: FARM_REPORT_DIR
settings.description: Directory farm run reports are written to.

settings.name: FARM_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS
settings.description: Per-request hard timeout so a hung endpoint can't deadlock a worker slot.

settings.name: FARM_GATE_TIMEOUT_MS
settings.description: Wall-clock timeout per gate command so a hung test can never stall the whole run.

settings.name: FARM_ENTITLEMENT_PROBE_TIMEOUT_MS
settings.description: Per-candidate wall-clock cap for the --canary entitlement pre-screen.

settings.name: FARM_API_MAX_RETRIES
settings.description: Transport-level retries for 429/5xx responses (honors Retry-After); distinct from gate retries.

settings.name: FARM_ABORT_ESCALATION_RATE
settings.description: Circuit breaker: abort dispatch once the escalation fraction exceeds this.

settings.name: FARM_ABORT_MIN_TASKS
settings.description: Minimum settled tasks before the escalation circuit breaker can fire.

settings.name: FARM_ENRICH_MAX_BYTES
settings.description: Byte cap on test-source + in-scope file context injected into the worker prompt (data-minimization; secret-redacted).

settings.name: FARM_MUTATION
settings.description: Mutation guard on/off — mutates the worker's impl and re-runs the narrow test to catch gamed or weak tests.

settings.name: FARM_MUTATION_SAMPLE
settings.description: Max mutants sampled per task.

settings.name: FARM_MUTATION_BUDGET_MS
settings.description: Per-task mutation time box in milliseconds.

settings.name: FARM_MUTATION_WARN_BELOW
settings.description: Mutation score below this attaches a warning that rides into Phase 3 review.

settings.name: FARM_MUTATION_ESCALATE_BELOW
settings.description: Mutation score at/below this (with >=5 mutants) hard-escalates the task.

settings.name: FARM_MUTATION_CMD
settings.description: External per-language mutation framework command; runs in the worktree and must print a trailing JSON line with a numeric score.

settings.name: CA_SANDBOX_EXEC_MAX_BYTES
settings.description: Per-stream stdout/stderr byte cap on /ca:sandbox exec output.

settings.name: CA_SANDBOX_CLONE_TIMEOUT_MS
settings.description: Repo clone timeout when creating a sandbox.

settings.name: CA_SANDBOX_CP_TIMEOUT_MS
settings.description: Host-to-box copy timeout.
